javascript:(function%20()%20%7B%0A'use%20strict'%3B%0Aconst%20VERSION%20%3D%20'0.1.0'%3B%0Aconst%20GLOBAL%20%3D%20'FMMyLocation'%3B%0Aconst%20DEFAULTS%20%3D%20%7B%0AautoStart%3A%20true%2C%0Afollow%3A%20false%2C%0Amock%3A%20false%2C%0AhighAccuracy%3A%20true%2C%0AmaxBreadcrumbPoints%3A%20500%2C%0AminBreadcrumbDistanceM%3A%208%2C%0AmapWaitMs%3A%2030000%2C%0AmapPollMs%3A%20400%2C%0A%7D%3B%0Aconst%20cfg%20%3D%20Object.assign(%0A%7B%7D%2C%0ADEFAULTS%2C%0Awindow.FM_MY_LOCATION_CONFIG%20%7C%7C%20%7B%7D%2C%0AparseHashConfig()%0A)%3B%0Aif%20(window%5BGLOBAL%5D%20%26%26%20typeof%20window%5BGLOBAL%5D.destroy%20%3D%3D%3D%20'function')%20%7B%0Awindow%5BGLOBAL%5D.destroy()%3B%0A%7D%0Aconst%20state%20%3D%20%7B%0Amap%3A%20null%2C%0Alayer%3A%20null%2C%0Amarker%3A%20null%2C%0AaccuracyCircle%3A%20null%2C%0Atrack%3A%20null%2C%0Acontrol%3A%20null%2C%0AwatchId%3A%20null%2C%0AmockTimer%3A%20null%2C%0Astarted%3A%20false%2C%0Afollow%3A%20!!cfg.follow%2C%0Alast%3A%20null%2C%0AtrackPoints%3A%20%5B%5D%2C%0Astatus%3A%20'loading'%2C%0Aerror%3A%20''%2C%0A%7D%3B%0Aconst%20api%20%3D%20%7B%0Aversion%3A%20VERSION%2C%0Astart%2C%0Astop%2C%0AtoggleFollow%2C%0Acenter%2C%0Adestroy%2C%0AuseMockLocation%2C%0AgetState%3A%20()%20%3D%3E%20Object.assign(%7B%7D%2C%20state%2C%20%7B%20map%3A%20!!state.map%20%7D)%2C%0A%7D%3B%0Awindow%5BGLOBAL%5D%20%3D%20api%3B%0AinjectCss()%3B%0AwaitForMap().then((map)%20%3D%3E%20%7B%0Astate.map%20%3D%20map%3B%0Ainstall(map)%3B%0AsetStatus('ready')%3B%0Aif%20(cfg.autoStart)%20start()%3B%0A%7D).catch((err)%20%3D%3E%20%7B%0AsetStatus('error'%2C%20err.message%20%7C%7C%20String(err))%3B%0AshowFloatingError(err.message%20%7C%7C%20String(err))%3B%0A%7D)%3B%0Afunction%20parseHashConfig()%20%7B%0Aconst%20text%20%3D%20%60%24%7Blocation.search%20%7C%7C%20''%7D%26%24%7Blocation.hash%20%7C%7C%20''%7D%60%3B%0Aconst%20out%20%3D%20%7B%7D%3B%0Aif%20(%2F(%3F%3A%5B%3F%23%26%5D%7C%5E)fmml_mock%3D1(%3F%3A%26%7C%24)%2F.test(text))%20out.mock%20%3D%20true%3B%0Aif%20(%2F(%3F%3A%5B%3F%23%26%5D%7C%5E)fmml_follow%3D1(%3F%3A%26%7C%24)%2F.test(text))%20out.follow%20%3D%20true%3B%0Areturn%20out%3B%0A%7D%0Afunction%20waitForMap()%20%7B%0Aconst%20started%20%3D%20Date.now()%3B%0Areturn%20new%20Promise((resolve%2C%20reject)%20%3D%3E%20%7B%0Aconst%20tryNow%20%3D%20()%20%3D%3E%20%7B%0Aconst%20map%20%3D%20findLeafletMap()%3B%0Aif%20(map)%20return%20resolve(map)%3B%0Aif%20(Date.now()%20-%20started%20%3E%20cfg.mapWaitMs)%20%7B%0Areturn%20reject(new%20Error('Could%20not%20find%20the%20Flymaster%20Leaflet%20map.%20Wait%20until%20the%20map%20is%20visible%2C%20then%20run%20the%20bookmarklet%20again.'))%3B%0A%7D%0AsetTimeout(tryNow%2C%20cfg.mapPollMs)%3B%0A%7D%3B%0AtryNow()%3B%0A%7D)%3B%0A%7D%0Afunction%20findLeafletMap()%20%7B%0Aconst%20L%20%3D%20window.L%3B%0Aif%20(!L%20%7C%7C%20!L.Map)%20return%20null%3B%0Aif%20(window.animator%20%26%26%20typeof%20window.animator.getMap%20%3D%3D%3D%20'function')%20%7B%0Aconst%20m%20%3D%20safeCall(()%20%3D%3E%20window.animator.getMap())%3B%0Aif%20(isLeafletMap(m))%20return%20m%3B%0A%7D%0Aif%20(isLeafletMap(window.map))%20return%20window.map%3B%0Afor%20(const%20key%20of%20Object.keys(window))%20%7B%0Aif%20(!%2Fmap%7Cleaflet%7Canimator%2Fi.test(key))%20continue%3B%0Aconst%20value%20%3D%20safeCall(()%20%3D%3E%20window%5Bkey%5D)%3B%0Aif%20(isLeafletMap(value))%20return%20value%3B%0Aif%20(value%20%26%26%20typeof%20value.getMap%20%3D%3D%3D%20'function')%20%7B%0Aconst%20nested%20%3D%20safeCall(()%20%3D%3E%20value.getMap())%3B%0Aif%20(isLeafletMap(nested))%20return%20nested%3B%0A%7D%0A%7D%0Areturn%20null%3B%0A%7D%0Afunction%20isLeafletMap(value)%20%7B%0Areturn%20!!(value%20%26%26%20window.L%20%26%26%20value%20instanceof%20window.L.Map%20%26%26%20typeof%20value.latLngToContainerPoint%20%3D%3D%3D%20'function')%3B%0A%7D%0Afunction%20safeCall(fn)%20%7B%0Atry%20%7B%20return%20fn()%3B%20%7D%20catch%20(_)%20%7B%20return%20null%3B%20%7D%0A%7D%0Afunction%20install(map)%20%7B%0Aconst%20L%20%3D%20window.L%3B%0Astate.layer%20%3D%20L.layerGroup().addTo(map)%3B%0Astate.track%20%3D%20L.polyline(%5B%5D%2C%20%7B%0Acolor%3A%20'%231a73e8'%2C%0Aweight%3A%203%2C%0Aopacity%3A%200.85%2C%0Ainteractive%3A%20false%2C%0A%7D).addTo(state.layer)%3B%0Aconst%20MyLocationControl%20%3D%20createMyLocationControlClass()%3B%0Astate.control%20%3D%20new%20MyLocationControl(%7B%20position%3A%20'topleft'%20%7D)%3B%0Astate.control.addTo(map)%3B%0AupdatePanel()%3B%0A%7D%0Afunction%20start()%20%7B%0Aif%20(!state.map)%20return%20setStatus('loading')%3B%0Aif%20(state.started)%20return%3B%0Astate.started%20%3D%20true%3B%0AsetStatus('starting')%3B%0Aif%20(cfg.mock)%20return%20useMockLocation()%3B%0Aif%20(!navigator.geolocation)%20%7B%0Astate.started%20%3D%20false%3B%0AsetStatus('error'%2C%20'This%20browser%20does%20not%20support%20geolocation.')%3B%0Areturn%3B%0A%7D%0Atry%20%7B%0Astate.watchId%20%3D%20navigator.geolocation.watchPosition(onPosition%2C%20onGeoError%2C%20%7B%0AenableHighAccuracy%3A%20!!cfg.highAccuracy%2C%0AmaximumAge%3A%201000%2C%0Atimeout%3A%2015000%2C%0A%7D)%3B%0A%7D%20catch%20(err)%20%7B%0Astate.started%20%3D%20false%3B%0AsetStatus('error'%2C%20err.message%20%7C%7C%20String(err))%3B%0A%7D%0A%7D%0Afunction%20stop()%20%7B%0Aif%20(state.watchId%20!%3D%20null)%20%7B%0Anavigator.geolocation.clearWatch(state.watchId)%3B%0Astate.watchId%20%3D%20null%3B%0A%7D%0Aif%20(state.mockTimer)%20%7B%0AclearInterval(state.mockTimer)%3B%0Astate.mockTimer%20%3D%20null%3B%0A%7D%0Astate.started%20%3D%20false%3B%0AsetStatus('stopped')%3B%0A%7D%0Afunction%20destroy()%20%7B%0Astop()%3B%0Aif%20(state.control%20%26%26%20state.map)%20state.map.removeControl(state.control)%3B%0Aif%20(state.layer%20%26%26%20state.map)%20state.map.removeLayer(state.layer)%3B%0Adocument.getElementById('fmml-style')%3F.remove()%3B%0Adocument.getElementById('fmml-floating-error')%3F.remove()%3B%0Adelete%20window%5BGLOBAL%5D%3B%0A%7D%0Afunction%20onGeoError(err)%20%7B%0Alet%20msg%20%3D%20err%20%26%26%20err.message%20%3F%20err.message%20%3A%20String(err%20%7C%7C%20'Unknown%20geolocation%20error')%3B%0Aif%20(location.protocol%20!%3D%3D%20'https%3A'%20%26%26%20location.hostname%20!%3D%3D%20'localhost')%20%7B%0Amsg%20%2B%3D%20'%20Geolocation%20requires%20HTTPS.'%3B%0A%7D%0AsetStatus('error'%2C%20msg)%3B%0A%7D%0Afunction%20onPosition(position)%20%7B%0Aconst%20c%20%3D%20position.coords%3B%0Aconst%20next%20%3D%20%7B%0Alat%3A%20c.latitude%2C%0Alon%3A%20c.longitude%2C%0Aaccuracy%3A%20Number.isFinite(c.accuracy)%20%3F%20c.accuracy%20%3A%20null%2C%0Aheading%3A%20Number.isFinite(c.heading)%20%3F%20c.heading%20%3A%20null%2C%0Aspeed%3A%20Number.isFinite(c.speed)%20%3F%20c.speed%20%3A%20null%2C%0Atimestamp%3A%20position.timestamp%20%7C%7C%20Date.now()%2C%0A%7D%3B%0Aif%20(next.heading%20%3D%3D%20null%20%26%26%20state.last)%20%7B%0Aconst%20moved%20%3D%20distanceM(state.last.lat%2C%20state.last.lon%2C%20next.lat%2C%20next.lon)%3B%0Aif%20(moved%20%3E%203)%20next.heading%20%3D%20bearingDeg(state.last.lat%2C%20state.last.lon%2C%20next.lat%2C%20next.lon)%3B%0A%7D%0AupdateLocation(next)%3B%0A%7D%0Afunction%20updateLocation(next)%20%7B%0Astate.last%20%3D%20next%3B%0AsetStatus('live')%3B%0Aconst%20L%20%3D%20window.L%3B%0Aconst%20ll%20%3D%20%5Bnext.lat%2C%20next.lon%5D%3B%0Aif%20(!state.marker)%20%7B%0Astate.marker%20%3D%20L.marker(ll%2C%20%7B%0Aicon%3A%20makeIcon(next.heading)%2C%0AzIndexOffset%3A%205000%2C%0Ainteractive%3A%20true%2C%0Atitle%3A%20'My%20location'%2C%0A%7D).addTo(state.layer)%3B%0Astate.marker.bindPopup(()%20%3D%3E%20popupHtml(next))%3B%0A%7D%20else%20%7B%0Astate.marker.setLatLng(ll)%3B%0Astate.marker.setIcon(makeIcon(next.heading))%3B%0Aif%20(state.marker.isPopupOpen())%20state.marker.setPopupContent(popupHtml(next))%3B%0A%7D%0Aif%20(!state.accuracyCircle)%20%7B%0Astate.accuracyCircle%20%3D%20L.circle(ll%2C%20accuracyStyle(next.accuracy)).addTo(state.layer)%3B%0A%7D%20else%20%7B%0Astate.accuracyCircle.setLatLng(ll)%3B%0Astate.accuracyCircle.setRadius(next.accuracy%20%7C%7C%200)%3B%0A%7D%0AaddBreadcrumb(ll)%3B%0Aif%20(state.follow)%20%7B%0Astate.map.panTo(ll%2C%20%7B%20animate%3A%20false%20%7D)%3B%0A%7D%0AupdatePanel()%3B%0A%7D%0Afunction%20addBreadcrumb(ll)%20%7B%0Aconst%20lastPoint%20%3D%20state.trackPoints%5Bstate.trackPoints.length%20-%201%5D%3B%0Aif%20(!lastPoint%20%7C%7C%20distanceM(lastPoint%5B0%5D%2C%20lastPoint%5B1%5D%2C%20ll%5B0%5D%2C%20ll%5B1%5D)%20%3E%3D%20cfg.minBreadcrumbDistanceM)%20%7B%0Astate.trackPoints.push(ll)%3B%0Aif%20(state.trackPoints.length%20%3E%20cfg.maxBreadcrumbPoints)%20state.trackPoints.shift()%3B%0Aif%20(state.track)%20state.track.setLatLngs(state.trackPoints)%3B%0A%7D%0A%7D%0Afunction%20center()%20%7B%0Aif%20(state.map%20%26%26%20state.last)%20%7B%0Astate.map.setView(%5Bstate.last.lat%2C%20state.last.lon%5D%2C%20Math.max(state.map.getZoom()%2C%2015)%2C%20%7B%20animate%3A%20true%20%7D)%3B%0A%7D%0A%7D%0Afunction%20toggleFollow(force)%20%7B%0Astate.follow%20%3D%20typeof%20force%20%3D%3D%3D%20'boolean'%20%3F%20force%20%3A%20!state.follow%3B%0Aif%20(state.follow)%20center()%3B%0AupdatePanel()%3B%0A%7D%0Afunction%20useMockLocation()%20%7B%0Acfg.mock%20%3D%20true%3B%0Aif%20(!state.map)%20return%3B%0Aif%20(state.mockTimer)%20clearInterval(state.mockTimer)%3B%0AsetStatus('mock')%3B%0Aconst%20center%20%3D%20state.map.getCenter()%3B%0Aconst%20startLat%20%3D%20center.lat%20%7C%7C%2041.15%3B%0Aconst%20startLon%20%3D%20center.lng%20%7C%7C%20-8.61%3B%0Alet%20t%20%3D%200%3B%0Astate.mockTimer%20%3D%20setInterval(()%20%3D%3E%20%7B%0At%20%2B%3D%201%3B%0Aconst%20r%20%3D%200.0025%3B%0Aconst%20lat%20%3D%20startLat%20%2B%20Math.sin(t%20%2F%2018)%20*%20r%3B%0Aconst%20lon%20%3D%20startLon%20%2B%20Math.cos(t%20%2F%2018)%20*%20r%3B%0AupdateLocation(%7B%0Alat%2C%0Alon%2C%0Aaccuracy%3A%2012%20%2B%208%20*%20Math.abs(Math.sin(t%20%2F%207))%2C%0Aheading%3A%20(t%20*%2020)%20%25%20360%2C%0Aspeed%3A%208%2C%0Atimestamp%3A%20Date.now()%2C%0A%7D)%3B%0A%7D%2C%201000)%3B%0A%7D%0Afunction%20setStatus(status%2C%20error)%20%7B%0Astate.status%20%3D%20status%3B%0Astate.error%20%3D%20error%20%7C%7C%20''%3B%0AupdatePanel()%3B%0A%7D%0Afunction%20updatePanel()%20%7B%0Aconst%20root%20%3D%20document.querySelector('.fmml-panel')%3B%0Aif%20(!root)%20return%3B%0Aconst%20status%20%3D%20root.querySelector('%5Bdata-fmml%3Dstatus%5D')%3B%0Aconst%20detail%20%3D%20root.querySelector('%5Bdata-fmml%3Ddetail%5D')%3B%0Aconst%20startButton%20%3D%20root.querySelector('%5Bdata-fmml%3Dstart%5D')%3B%0Aconst%20followButton%20%3D%20root.querySelector('%5Bdata-fmml%3Dfollow%5D')%3B%0Aif%20(status)%20status.textContent%20%3D%20labelForStatus()%3B%0Aif%20(detail)%20detail.textContent%20%3D%20detailText()%3B%0Aif%20(startButton)%20startButton.textContent%20%3D%20state.started%20%3F%20'Stop'%20%3A%20'Start'%3B%0Aif%20(followButton)%20followButton.textContent%20%3D%20state.follow%20%3F%20'Follow%3A%20on'%20%3A%20'Follow%3A%20off'%3B%0Aroot.classList.toggle('is-error'%2C%20state.status%20%3D%3D%3D%20'error')%3B%0Aroot.classList.toggle('is-live'%2C%20state.status%20%3D%3D%3D%20'live'%20%7C%7C%20state.status%20%3D%3D%3D%20'mock')%3B%0A%7D%0Afunction%20labelForStatus()%20%7B%0Aif%20(state.status%20%3D%3D%3D%20'mock')%20return%20'My%20location%3A%20mock'%3B%0Aif%20(state.status%20%3D%3D%3D%20'live')%20return%20'My%20location%3A%20live'%3B%0Aif%20(state.status%20%3D%3D%3D%20'starting')%20return%20'Requesting%20GPS%E2%80%A6'%3B%0Aif%20(state.status%20%3D%3D%3D%20'stopped')%20return%20'My%20location%3A%20stopped'%3B%0Aif%20(state.status%20%3D%3D%3D%20'error')%20return%20'My%20location%3A%20error'%3B%0Aif%20(state.status%20%3D%3D%3D%20'ready')%20return%20'My%20location%3A%20ready'%3B%0Areturn%20'Finding%20map%E2%80%A6'%3B%0A%7D%0Afunction%20detailText()%20%7B%0Aif%20(state.error)%20return%20state.error%3B%0Aif%20(!state.last)%20return%20state.status%20%3D%3D%3D%20'ready'%20%3F%20'Press%20Start%20if%20GPS%20did%20not%20prompt%20automatically.'%20%3A%20''%3B%0Aconst%20speed%20%3D%20state.last.speed%20%3D%3D%20null%20%3F%20''%20%3A%20%60%20%C2%B7%20%24%7B(state.last.speed%20*%203.6).toFixed(0)%7D%20km%2Fh%60%3B%0Aconst%20acc%20%3D%20state.last.accuracy%20%3D%3D%20null%20%3F%20''%20%3A%20%60%C2%B1%24%7BMath.round(state.last.accuracy)%7D%20m%60%3B%0Areturn%20%60%24%7Bstate.last.lat.toFixed(5)%7D%2C%20%24%7Bstate.last.lon.toFixed(5)%7D%20%24%7Bacc%7D%24%7Bspeed%7D%60%3B%0A%7D%0Afunction%20popupHtml(p)%20%7B%0Aconst%20speed%20%3D%20p.speed%20%3D%3D%20null%20%3F%20'%E2%80%94'%20%3A%20%60%24%7B(p.speed%20*%203.6).toFixed(1)%7D%20km%2Fh%60%3B%0Aconst%20heading%20%3D%20p.heading%20%3D%3D%20null%20%3F%20'%E2%80%94'%20%3A%20%60%24%7BMath.round(p.heading)%7D%C2%B0%60%3B%0Aconst%20acc%20%3D%20p.accuracy%20%3D%3D%20null%20%3F%20'%E2%80%94'%20%3A%20%60%C2%B1%24%7BMath.round(p.accuracy)%7D%20m%60%3B%0Areturn%20%60%3Cb%3EMy%20location%3C%2Fb%3E%3Cbr%3E%24%7Bp.lat.toFixed(6)%7D%2C%20%24%7Bp.lon.toFixed(6)%7D%3Cbr%3EAccuracy%3A%20%24%7Bacc%7D%3Cbr%3ESpeed%3A%20%24%7Bspeed%7D%3Cbr%3EHeading%3A%20%24%7Bheading%7D%60%3B%0A%7D%0Afunction%20accuracyStyle(accuracy)%20%7B%0Areturn%20%7B%0Aradius%3A%20accuracy%20%7C%7C%200%2C%0Acolor%3A%20'%231a73e8'%2C%0Aweight%3A%202%2C%0Aopacity%3A%200.65%2C%0AfillColor%3A%20'%231a73e8'%2C%0AfillOpacity%3A%200.12%2C%0Ainteractive%3A%20false%2C%0A%7D%3B%0A%7D%0Afunction%20makeIcon(heading)%20%7B%0Aconst%20rot%20%3D%20Number.isFinite(heading)%20%3F%20heading%20%3A%200%3B%0Aconst%20arrowOpacity%20%3D%20Number.isFinite(heading)%20%3F%201%20%3A%200.25%3B%0Areturn%20window.L.divIcon(%7B%0AclassName%3A%20'fmml-icon-wrap'%2C%0AiconSize%3A%20%5B34%2C%2034%5D%2C%0AiconAnchor%3A%20%5B17%2C%2017%5D%2C%0ApopupAnchor%3A%20%5B0%2C%20-18%5D%2C%0Ahtml%3A%20%60%3Cdiv%20class%3D%22fmml-dot%22%3E%3Cdiv%20class%3D%22fmml-arrow%22%20style%3D%22transform%3A%20rotate(%24%7Brot%7Ddeg)%3B%20opacity%3A%24%7BarrowOpacity%7D%22%3E%3C%2Fdiv%3E%3C%2Fdiv%3E%60%2C%0A%7D)%3B%0A%7D%0Afunction%20createMyLocationControlClass()%20%7B%0Areturn%20window.L.Control.extend(%7B%0AonAdd%3A%20function%20()%20%7B%0Aconst%20div%20%3D%20window.L.DomUtil.create('div'%2C%20'fmml-panel%20leaflet-bar')%3B%0Adiv.innerHTML%20%3D%20%60%0A%3Cdiv%20clas %20180%3B%0Aconst%20a%20%3D%20Math.sin(dp%20%2F%202)%20**%202%20%2B%20Math.cos(p1)%20*%20Math.cos(p2)%20*%20Math.sin(dl%20%2F%202)%20**%202%3B%0Areturn%20R%20*%202%20*%20Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a)%2C%20Math.sqrt(1%20-%20a))%3B%0A%7D%0Afunction%20bearingDeg(lat1%2C%20lon1%2C%20lat2%2C%20lon2)%20%7B%0Aconst%20p1%20%3D%20lat1%20*%20Math.PI%20%2F%20180%3B%0Aconst%20p2%20%3D%20lat2%20*%20Math.PI%20%2F%20180%3B%0Aconst%20dl%20%3D%20(lon2%20-%20lon1)%20*%20Math.PI%20%2F%20180%3B%0Aconst%20y%20%3D%20Math.sin(dl)%20*%20Math.cos(p2)%3B%0Aconst%20x%20%3D%20Math.cos(p1)%20*%20Math.sin(p2)%20-%20Math.sin(p1)%20*%20Math.cos(p2)%20*%20Math.cos(dl)%3B%0Areturn%20(Math.atan2(y%2C%20x)%20*%20180%20%2F%20Math.PI%20%2B%20360)%20%25%20360%3B%0A%7D%0A%7D)()%3B
